- Description: Kopi Bar & Bakery partner page setup — direction & images

  Details:
  Provided direction, all 5 photos (Nora with cacao bag, exterior, tasting session, hours signage, BAMPFA entrance, storefront logo), and decision-making for the complete Kopi Bar & Bakery partner page setup on agroverse.shop.
  
  **What was done:**
  - Added Kopi Bar to partners-data.js for Pacific West Coast path rendering
  - Fixed nav/footer standardization on the Kopi Bar detail page
  - Uploaded 5 photos + storefront logo to the page
  - Updated Pacific West Coast path to use Nora's photo as the stop image
  - Multiple merges and prod promotions
  
  **PRs:**
